title: gymnogramma rutifolia var. australasica
intro: Gymnogramma rutifolia var. australasica is a variety of the Gymnogramma rutifolia plant, a type of flowering plant in the Asteraceae family. It is native to Australia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant has been found to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, and is also used to treat skin conditions and respiratory issues. Gymnogramma rutifolia var. australasica is typically prepared as a tea or infusion, and can also be used in tinctures or as a topical cream, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
